public_api_summary: QR code scanner library with web camera support, WebWorker processing, and multiple build targets (ES6, UMD, legacy). Supports both continuous video scanning and single image scanning with native BarcodeDetector fallback.
description: A javascript QR scanner library with webcam support, WebWorker processing, and high detection rates. Lightweight and optimized with Google Closure Compiler.
risks: Build output (*.min.js, *.min.js.map, types/) was previously tracked in git - now properly gitignored
Complex rollup build process with closure compiler - requires proper TypeScript and rollup setup
Uses external jsqr-es6 dependency via relative path import in worker.ts
WebWorker implementation requires careful handling of dynamic imports
No existing test suite - testing needs to be implemented from scratch
